LightningComponentBundle.description: Embedded chat panel that talks to the Agentforce Employee Agent.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Header text shown at the top of the card.

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: SLDS icon shown in the card header (e.g. utility:einstein).

property.name: initialMessage
property.label: Initial Message
property.description: Optional message sent automatically when the component loads (requires Auto Start).

property.name: autoStart
property.label: Auto Start
property.description: Automatically send the initial message on load.

property.name: includeRecordContext
property.label: Include Record Context
property.description: Prefix each message with the current recordId so the agent knows which record the user is on.

property.name: maxHeight
property.label: Chat Area Max Height (px)
property.description: Maximum height of the scrollable chat area in pixels.
